steps.title: Supply the main verb
steps.content: The subject is the International Astronomical Union. The sentence has no other finite main verb, so the blank must provide one to make a complete sentence.

steps.title: Reject nonfinite fragments
steps.content: Choice B uses an infinitive, and Choices C and D use participial phrases. Those forms can modify a noun, but they cannot serve as the sentence's main verb here. Would finally acknowledge supplies the needed finite verb phrase. The answer is A.
